title: A2 · Elementary+
subtitle: Real-life A2 vocabulary for daily life, services, travel, health, study and simple opinions.
focus: Single-word vocabulary first, with a small number of useful fixed expressions in each group.

groups.title: Rutina y casa · Daily life that actually happens
groups.focus: Concrete A2 words for mornings, chores, clothing, rooms, small problems and everyday choices.

groups.title: Ciudad y transporte · Getting around without panic
groups.focus: Useful city, housing, transport and service vocabulary for moving through real places.

groups.title: Salud y cuerpo · Symptoms, care and recovery
groups.focus: A2 vocabulary for explaining health problems, appointments, medicine and how you feel.

groups.title: Estudio y trabajo · Practical school and job language
groups.focus: Words for classes, tasks, applications, interviews, schedules and small responsibilities.

groups.title: Relaciones y ocio · People, plans and feelings
groups.focus: A2 vocabulary for friends, invitations, plans, misunderstandings, hobbies and emotions.

groups.title: Compras y comida · Real errands and small decisions
groups.focus: Practical vocabulary for groceries, shops, prices, cooking, restaurants and daily money.

groups.title: Trámites y servicios · Forms, problems and solutions
groups.focus: Useful A2 words for offices, documents, appointments, complaints and practical services.

groups.title: Naturaleza y tiempo · Weather, places and small risks
groups.focus: Concrete vocabulary for weather, landscapes, animals, environment and outdoor plans.

groups.title: Tecnología y medios · Screens, messages and reliable info
groups.focus: Words for phones, computers, online communication, news and simple digital safety.

groups.title: Opiniones y relatos · Explain, compare and connect ideas
groups.focus: A2 words for telling what happened, comparing options, giving reasons and sounding natural.
